orientation_convention: ordered vertices v0,v1,v2,v3; outward face normals
claim_firewall: The full geometry is fixed by explicit vertices and redundantly by closed area normals.
Equal labels alone are not claimed to determine the tetrahedral shape.
The q-Racah operator package is not yet claimed to quantize this exact tetrahedron.
The geometry-to-operator semantic bridge remains a separate obligation.
